<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="3" border="20"> <diagram name="Worked Example" id="K0xy4hxCc8YIZXumZxqR"> <mxGraphModel dx="1328" dy="935" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="200" pageHeight="280" background="#ffffff" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=26;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;spacing=0;" value="Cross-corpus evaluation protocol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="500" x="17" y="132" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=12;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=1.3;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=16;fontColor=#000000;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;" value="" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="493" width="440" x="47" y="207" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=16;fontColor=#000000;fontStyle=1;whiteSpace=wrap;spacing=0;" value="Protocol" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="120" x="75" y="226" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=16;fontColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=6;" value="<b>1. Fit on source corpus X<br></b>Train split only; keep the fitted classifier unchanged." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="360" x="93" y="265" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=16;fontColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=6;" value="<b>2. Block cross-corpus leakage<br></b>Remove target-test rows whose normalized key occurs in source-train." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="104" width="360" x="93" y="415" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="eGAlG9VYLguiU505fvFR-6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;arcSize=10;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#000000;strokeWidth=1.5;fontFamily=Comic Sans MS;fontSize=16;fontColor=#000000;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;spacing=6;" value="<b>3. Evaluate on target corpus Y<br></b>Score the remaining target test split as zero-shot transfer." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="92" width="360" x="93" y="577" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell Transfer performance drops sharply; the worst-case macro-F1 decline reaches 63 points." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="394" x="893" y="582" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div:
1. Fit on source corpus X
Train split only; keep the fitted classifier unchanged.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 355px; margin-left: 87px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
2. Block cross-corpus leakage
Remove target-test rows whose normalized key occurs in source-train.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(237, 237, 237));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 350px; height: 1px; padding-top: 511px; margin-left: 87px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 16px; font-family: 'Comic Sans MS'; color: light-dark(#000000, #ededed); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
3. Evaluate on target corpus Y
Score the remaining target test split as zero-shot transfer.
